headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences reports 15% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: A 15% decline in operating income directly signals reduced profitability and operational inefficiency.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences completes planned facility upgrade in Asia Pacific

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences CTO addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office indicates geographic expansion, which is a positive growth signal but carries long-term execution uncertainty.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
